scene_input.scene_summary: The Prophet leads his army northwards to Dūmat al-Jandal, taking his enemies by surprise.
scene_input.key_visual_action: The Prophet riding a horse, leading a procession of soldiers on foot and horseback.
scene_input.setting: A desert landscape with hills and palm trees, in the distance a city or settlement.

schema_output.scene_summary: The Prophet leads his army northwards to Dūmat al-Jandal, taking his enemies by surprise.
schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 199
schema_output.moral_lesson: The importance of surprise and strategy in warfare.

characters.name: The Central Figure
characters.appearance: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe and a deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders, a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades

characters.name: The Muslims
characters.appearance: various builds, postures, and clothing, with a mix of thobes and woolen cloaks in different colors

schema_output.narrative_text: The Prophet rode at the head of the army, leading them northwards towards Dūmat al-Jandal. He took his enemies by surprise, and they were quickly defeated.
schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. A vast desert landscape with rolling hills and palm trees in the distance, a city or settlement partially visible on the horizon. Late afternoon sunlight casts a warm glow across the scene, with the sun high in the sky. In the foreground, a lone figure on horseback rides at the head of a procession of soldiers on foot and horseback, moving steadily northwards. The man in the green cloak is seen entirely from behind: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe and a deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders, a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades. The people following closely behind, their faces visible and their postures varied. Soft warm golden light, expansive and adventurous mood. Medium shot from a slightly elevated angle. Warm beige, sand, and golden palette with the deep green cloak as a color anchor. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
_safety_changes: 'the central figure' -> 'the man in the green cloak'
